54066003.about: Use this option to open the menu during design time so you can easily customize the close button and menu items for small screens. This option is ignored when publishing the page.

54066004.about: The width of the space between menu items in pixels.

54066005.about: The maximum screen width used for showing the small screens version of the menu.

13941001.about: Causes the animation to start farther

20609005.about: Factor that affects the delay that each animated element in a cascade animation will be assigned

20609007.about: Origin of the animation (the valid values depend on the chosen Effect)

20609009.about: The Reveal animation effect to be applied

20609010.about: Whether the animation should make element(s) disappear

20609011.about: Whether the animation should run only once, instead of everytime the element enters, exits and re-enters the viewport
